headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid RVTY and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Revvity currently trades at $94.26 per share and has shown little upside over the past six months, posting a small loss of 1.5%. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 6.1% gain during that period.
